steps.title: Translate 'p% greater than 12'
steps.content:
When a number is p% greater than another, we multiply that number by (1 + p/100). So if 180 is p% greater than 12:
$$180 = 12\left(1 + \frac{p}{100}\right)$$

steps.title: Solve for p
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 12:
$$15 = 1 + \frac{p}{100}$$
Subtract 1:
$$14 = \frac{p}{100}$$
Multiply by 100:
$$p = 1400$$
This matches Choice B.
